name: Dr. David Hirsch
title: Founder & Chief Investment Officer
bio: Founded Quantum Funds 20 years ago pioneering derivatives-based investing strategies. Manages $155B in absolute return funds with sophisticated risk management and market timing expertise.

name: Elizabeth Barker
title: Head of Derivatives Trading
bio: Leads derivatives trading team generating consistent returns through options strategies. 25 years derivatives expertise with deep expertise in volatility trading and exotic options.

name: Professor Richard Kim
title: Chief Strategist & Head of Research
bio: PhD Mathematics from MIT leading research team. 22 years derivatives strategy with publications on exotic option pricing and volatility modeling in leading finance journals.

name: Amanda Cross
title: Senior Portfolio Manager - Volatility Strategies
bio: Manages $65B volatility fund exploiting volatility term structure and skew. 18 years volatility investing with consistent alpha generation across market regimes.

name: George Papadakis
title: Head of Equity Derivatives
bio: Leads equity derivatives investment platform managing $48B in positions. 21 years equity derivatives expertise with specialization in dividend arbitrage and skew trading.

name: Laura Bergman
title: Options Analyst - Interest Rate Derivatives
bio: Specializes in interest rate swaption and cap/floor strategies. 14 years rates derivatives expertise with deep understanding of yield curve dynamics and option pricing.

name: Chen Wu
title: Trader - Exotic Derivatives
bio: Executes complex exotic derivatives trading including barriers, lookbacks, and autocallables. 17 years trading exotic products with focus on structuring and execution excellence.

name: Petra von Neumann
title: Strategist - Fixed Income Derivatives
bio: Provides strategic guidance on credit derivatives and structured credit products. 19 years credit derivatives research with expertise in CDS pricing and credit spread dynamics.

name: Antonio Vitale
title: Analyst - Commodity Derivatives
bio: Identifies opportunities in commodity derivatives and energy futures. 12 years commodity derivatives expertise with specialization in crude oil and natural gas markets.

name: Hana Okonkwo
title: Risk Manager - Derivatives Risk
bio: Manages Greeks-based risk framework for $155B derivatives portfolio. 15 years derivatives risk with expertise in Greeks hedging and counterparty risk management.
